# Parameter Golf - Kaggle 2xT4 Training

This notebook runs the SOTA parameter golf training on Kaggle 2xT4 GPUs.

## Features
- SP8192 vocabulary (adapts to SP1024 if download fails)
- GPTQ-SDClip quantization (int6 matrices, int8 embeddings)
- Depth recurrence (loop layers 4-5)
- MuonEq-R optimizer
- TTT (Test-Time Training) at evaluation

## Usage

1. Upload `train_kaggle.py` to Kaggle
2. Set environment variables or use defaults
3. Run - no external data needed (auto-downloads from HuggingFace)
